title: Quality Control
description: Activities to check and optimize data accuracy and precision after collection; part of quality management focused on fulfilling quality requirements.

definitions.definition: Activities to check and optimize data accuracy and precision after collection; part of quality management focused on fulfilling quality requirements.
definitions.sources:
- (1) CEOS/ISO:19159 [ [RD10](https://www.iso.org/standard/60080.html) ],
- (2) ISO:9000 [ [RD7](https://www.iso.org/standard/45481.html) ]
- RD10: ISO/TS 19159-1:2014(en), Geographic information - Calibration and validation of remote sensing imagery sensors and data — Part 1: Optical sensors
- RD7: ISO 9000:2015(en), Quality management systems - Fundamentals and vocabulary
